landmarks.name: Statue of Liberty
landmarks.shortText: A giant green statue holding a torch.
landmarks.storyText: Big Cat arrives by boat and sees a huge lady holding a bright torch, as if saying welcome to New York.
landmarks.mission: Raise your hand like a torch and say Welcome!
landmarks.videoIdea: Boat moves across water, statue appears, torch sparkles.

landmarks.name: Empire State Building
landmarks.shortText: A super tall building reaching up to the sky.
landmarks.storyText: Big Cat looks up and up and up until the building almost touches the clouds.
landmarks.mission: Stand tall and build a tower with blocks.
landmarks.videoIdea: Camera moves upward along the building with clouds passing by.

landmarks.name: Times Square
landmarks.shortText: A bright place full of lights and giant screens.
landmarks.storyText: At night, Big Cat sees bright signs everywhere and feels like the city never sleeps.
landmarks.mission: Twinkle your fingers and say Bright city!
landmarks.videoIdea: Neon signs blink, screens glow, cars pass by.
